/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libroslib.so -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslib/lib/libroslib.so CMakeFiles/roslib.dir/src/package.cpp.o   -L/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librospack.so -lpython3.10 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -ltinyxml2 -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
